hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in *.js|*.mjs) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npm run lint -- --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; npm run format:fix -- "$FILE" 2>/dev/null;; esac; exit 0
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.scss && -f "$FILE" ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.njk && -f "$FILE" ]]; then if grep -qE '<script[^>]*>|<style[^>]*>|\bstyle=' "$FILE"; then echo "Security: inline <script>, <style>, or style= attribute found in $(basename $FILE). Move scripts to external .js files and styles to external .scss files." >&2; exit 2; fi; COUNT=$(grep -c '| safe' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [[ "$COUNT" -gt 0 ]]; then echo "Warning: $COUNT use(s) of '| safe' in $(basename $FILE) — only use on pre-sanitised trusted content, never on user-supplied data." >&2; fi; fi; exit 0

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git (commit|push)'; then BRANCH=$(cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$BRANCH" == 'main' || "$BRANCH" == 'master' ]]; then echo "Direct commits and pushes to '$BRANCH' are not allowed. Create a feature branch first (e.g. feature/my-change)." >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0
